worklog.details: Built complete Ambis Token payment UI in MOCK MODE. Files created: src/context/CoinContext.js (global state), src/services/payment/mockPaymentService.js (mock logic with TODO Mayar comments), src/components/payment/CoinBalance.js (navbar widget), src/components/payment/PackageCard.js (pricing cards), src/components/payment/PaymentModal.js (4-state payment modal), src/pages/AmbisToken.js (main page). Integrated CoinProvider into AppWrapper.js. Wired CoinBalance into UnifiedNavbar.js. Added AMBIS_TOKEN view to App.js.
Created development1 branch. Updated .gitignore to exclude src/config/ and .env. Performed initial push to GitHub origin.
